title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
